statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: remove plain CVE feed nodes from the deprecated cartography:cve module; delete this migration in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (c:CVE) WHERE labels(c) = ['CVE'] AND c._module_name = 'cartography:cve' AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (c)-[r]-() WHERE NOT type(r) IN ['RESOURCE', 'ENRICHES'] } WITH c LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE OPTIONAL MATCH (c)-[r:RESOURCE|ENRICHES]-() DELETE r WITH DISTINCT c DELETE c RETURN count(c) AS TotalCompleted
